subcodes.first_line: O people! The lights of Truth have shone forth, the verses of Truth have been made manifest, the ocean of grace hath surged, and the Sun of Reality hath shed its radiant beams [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قوم ، انوار حقّ ساطع شده آيات حقّ ظاهر شده دريای فضل بموج آمده و آفتاب حقيقت پرتو عنايت بخشيده
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual springtime, @love of God
